Insuranc 0.0

Description of Goods Customs Value $ EC Tariff No . Weight ( kg ) Supplementary
I , the undersigned , ARLENA MITCHELL ( FREIGHT 57.00 US ) do hereby declare that the above particulars are true and correct .
Dated this day of 20
